regional_summary_6h.headline: MENA threat index 2.04 (STABLE, steady) driven by Iran

bullets.text: Iran's ongoing military conflict with neighboring countries contributes to regional instability
Diplomatic tensions between Iran and other nations, including the US and Israel, remain high
Humanitarian crises in Iran and surrounding areas, such as refugee displacement and human rights concerns, persist

markets.headline: Index forecast rising; Brent +0.0%; gold +0.0%; VIX -0.0% (model estimate).
markets.method_note: Threat beta = OLS of daily log-returns on the index change at the lead lag; launch-day estimates lean on BNTI-seeded history. Association, not causation.
